headline: Trump's Epstein Files FLOP рҹ’Ҙрҹ“ңрҹҳ© MAGA Meltdown Incoming рҹ”ҘрҹҚ‘
text:
Friday's Epstein files DROP рҹ’Јрҹ“ң was a TOTAL WHIMPER рҹҳҙрҹ’Ө вҖ“ blacked-out REDACTIONS рҹ–Өрҹҡ« thicker than Ghislaine's LITTLE BLACK BOOK рҹ““рҹҚҶ, leaving MAGA SIMPS рҹӨЎрҹҳЎ RAGING HARDER than QAnon at a pizza parlor рҹҚ•рҹ‘»! Pam Bondi рҹ’…рҹ‘©вҖҚвҡ–пёҸ flexing on X рҹҗҰрҹ“ұ: 'Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ is the TRANSPARENT DADDY рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘§ most open admin EVAH' вҖ“ but replies? 'LIAR рҹҡ«рҹӨҘ ARREST THIS BITCH рҹ”’рҹҚ‘ for COVER-UP!' Conservative YouTubers hawking BITCOIN рҹҡҖрҹ’° screaming 'VOTE for ANYONE who JAILS Bondi рҹҸӣпёҸрҹҡ”!' Trump's FRINGE COALITION рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹ’»рҹӨ– вҖ“ Joe Rogan bros рҹҺҷпёҸрҹҚҶ, Libs of TikTok CHAYA рҹ”Ҙрҹ“ұ, Jack Posobiec CONSPIRACY KING рҹ‘‘рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, Scott Presler VOTER WHISPERER рҹ—іпёҸрҹҳӨ вҖ“ got TEASED with DoJ BINDERS рҹ“Ғ 'Phase 1' SLAY? Nah, EMPTY CALORIES рҹӨҸрҹҳ©, backlash BIGGER than Epstein's ISLAND GUEST LIST рҹҸқпёҸрҹҚҶрҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ!

Wall of celebs PICs рҹ“ёвңЁ вҖ“ Bill Clinton рҹҺёрҹҳҸ, Mick Jagger рҹӘЁрҹ‘…, Michael Jackson рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ•ә, Walter Cronkite рҹ“°рҹ§“ chilling with JEFFREY вҖ“ NO CRIME PROOF рҹҡ«рҹҚ‘ but REDACTIONS got 'em CONVINCED it's the ULTIMATE COVER-UP рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ”’ 'GREATEST PRESIDENTIAL HIDING SPOT EVAH!' Trump campaigned on 'RELEASE THE FILES рҹ“ңрҹҡҖ' last year, Bondi like 'SITTING ON MY DESK RIGHT NOW рҹ–ҘпёҸрҹҳҳ' вҖ“ months later? FIZZLE рҹ’Ҙрҹҳў! Prof Joe Uscinski рҹ§ рҹ“ҡ spilling tea вҳ•: MAGA now SKEPTIC SIMPS рҹӨЁрҹҡ« vs institutions, QAnon'd up on KID TRAFFICKING PANIC рҹҳұрҹ‘¶ вҖ“ they WANT docs PROVING their WILD THEORIES рҹҰ„рҹ“ң not BORING TRUTH!

White House boss Susie Wiles рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’јрҹ“Ҳ in Vanity Fair TEA вҳ•: Epstein STANS are 'JOE ROGAN LISTENERS' рҹҺ§рҹҚҶ вҖ“ young bros NOT locked into GOP, just TRUMP SIMPS рҹӨӨрҹҚҠ. She calls it HIT PIECE рҹ“°рҹ’Ҙ but OWNS the QUOTE: 'Make 'em REPUBLICAN VOTERS FOREVER рҹ”’рҹ—іпёҸ!' Polls? Manhattan Institute рҹ“Ҡрҹ”Ҙ says 1/3 'NEW ENTRANT REPS' рҹҶ•рҹҡӘ вҖ“ half MIGHT bail by 2026 рҹҳұрҹ“ү. Influencers GONE GHOST рҹ‘» вҖ“ Laura Loomer рҹ“ұрҹ—ЈпёҸ 'EXONERATES TRUMP рҹҳҮрҹҡ« now SHUT UP MEDIA!' (200+ Epstein posts this year рҹ“Ҳрҹ•өпёҸ) while Chaya, Poso, Presler ZIPPED рҹӨҗ after binder BUST рҹ’Ҙ. MAGA INFIGHTING рҹҚҝрҹ”Ҙ вҖ“ Turning Point conf exploding over FREE SPEECH рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҡ«, ANTI-SEMITISM рҹҳ рҹҮ®рҹҮұ, Charlie Kirk DRAMA рҹҺӯ!

Jared Holt рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“Ҡ: 'MAGA TRAIN DERAILING рҹҡӮрҹ’Ҙ from triumphant BEAST рҹҰҒ to HOT MESS рҹҳ©!' MTG Marjorie Taylor Greene рҹ”ҘрҹҮәрҹҮё RAGE-QUITTING CONGRESS? Nah, she's BLASTING 'NOT MAGA рҹҡ«рҹҚ‘!' Thomas Massie рҹ§”рҹ—іпёҸ teaming with DEM Ro Khanna рҹӨқрҹ•ҠпёҸ to SLAP Bondi with CONTEMPT CHARGES вҡ–пёҸрҹҡ” вҖ“ 'VIOLATING LAW рҹҘ·рҹ“ң!' More docs COMING рҹ—һпёҸрҹ“Ұ вҖ“ Deputy AG Todd Blanche promises HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS рҹҳірҹҡҖ by year's end. Will it MOON the LIST рҹ•әрҹҚҶ or BUST the coalition like Epstein's CELL SUICIDE рҹҸ рҹ’Җ? MAGA sweating рҹҳ°рҹ’Ұ if Rogan Bros BOUNCE рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡӘ вҖ“ Trump better DROP the MIC рҹҺӨрҹ’Ј or watch his FRINGE FLOCK FLY AWAY рҹҗ‘вңҲпёҸ!
